# Pro Tools / Cubase / Logic Pro — mixer channel strips, meters, faders

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** A

**Notes:** Grey-rack + vertical faders + strip-of-controls = tool language for 'many parallel processes visualized'.

**Credits / sources:** Sound On Sound, Apple Logic Pro docs, Steinberg forums, Splice blog.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
